prompt: A highly detailed, isometric 3D miniature diorama map of {argument name="city name" default="Chongqing"}, blending traditional Chinese architecture with modern skyscrapers, set against a vintage parchment map background. The scene features a winding river with a modern bridge connecting a densely packed peninsula of high-rises to older, multi-tiered traditional buildings glowing with warm light. A monorail train curves along a track near the water. Key landmarks are labeled with vertical banners containing Chinese characters, such as "洪崖洞" (Hongyadong) and "解放碑" (Jiefangbei). The top left corner displays large calligraphy reading "{argument name="main title" default="重庆"}" above the English text "{argument name="english subtitle" default="CHONGQING"}" and smaller Chinese text "山城雾都·江城重庆" alongside a red seal. The lighting is warm and cinematic, emphasizing the intricate textures of the miniature buildings, trees, and water, creating a tilt-shift photography effect.
translatedPrompt: A highly detailed, isometric 3D miniature diorama map of {argument name="city name" default="Chongqing"}, blending traditional Chinese architecture with modern skyscrapers, set against a vintage parchment map background. The scene features a winding river with a modern bridge connecting a densely packed peninsula of high-rises to older, multi-tiered traditional buildings glowing with warm light. A monorail train curves along a track near the water. Key landmarks are labeled with vertical banners containing Chinese characters, such as "洪崖洞" (Hongyadong) and "解放碑" (Jiefangbei). The top left corner displays large calligraphy reading "{argument name="main title" default="重庆"}" above the English text "{argument name="english subtitle" default="CHONGQING"}" and smaller Chinese text "山城雾都·江城重庆" alongside a red seal. The lighting is warm and cinematic, emphasizing the intricate textures of the miniature buildings, trees, and water, creating a tilt-shift photography effect.

breakdown.creativeCore: Miniature 3D City Diorama Map：Generates a highly detailed, isometric 3D miniature diorama of a city blending traditional and modern architecture on a vintage map background.
breakdown.subject: 空间
breakdown.bestUse: 空间概念、建筑场景、游戏场景、产品场景盒子

analysis.copyTemplate:
Create a 空间/场景 image for [用途/受众].

Main subject:
[主体]，[数量/状态/动作]，[关键外观/材质/身份]。

Scene:
[地点/环境]，[时间/天气/时代]，[背景元素]。

Composition:
[参考构图: isometric, vertical]。

Visual style:
[参考风格: cinematic, 3d, vintage, isometric]。

Lighting and camera:
[光线/镜头/景深/质感]。

Text requirements:
包含标注/说明。

Quality constraints:
clean, coherent, polished, readable hierarchy, no random text, no visual clutter.
